Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Buy from reputable worm farms rather than pet stores or big box retailers. Order 1/2 to 1 pound per square foot of bin surface area. Expect to pay $30-50 per pound including shipping. Local suppliers often offer better prices and healthier worms.
